#  View Drawing Area (Android) 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Read Only' or higher permissions on the project's Drawings tool.
  * In order to see the **Areas** button, you will need to have 'Drawings by Area' configured on your Procore account. See [Enable or Disable Drawing Areas](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/enable-or-disable-drawing-areas) and [Add Drawing Area](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/add-a-drawing-area).
  * This item can be viewed or edited offline if it was previously viewed and cached on your mobile device. Tasks performed in offline mode sync with Procore once a network connection is reestablished.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Drawings** tool using the Procore app on an Android mobile device.
  2. Tap to select a drawing area from the left pane.  
_Note:_ This action will show only drawings associated with the selected area.  
  
![Drawing Areas](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/1ed6ed14007d69b7ed96e0469e74c6e7/c9eed07f4cc86256e2c84b37ade5882b/drawing-areas.png?fm=webp)


## See Also
  * [Drawings (Android) - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-android/permissions)
  * [Search for and Filter Drawings (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-android/tutorials/search-for-and-filter-drawings-android)
  * [Download Drawings (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-android/tutorials/download-drawings-android)
title: View Drawing Area (Android)
description: How to view multiple drawing areas in the Drawings tool using the Procore app on an Android mobile device.
